steps.t: Viola Brockhouse, the Woodworker's Guild-leader is in the guild hall in Esteldín. The Master of Crafting Guilds has instructed you to speak with Viola…
Guthki is in the Woodworker's Guild-hall in Esteldín. Viola Brockhouse has directed you to speak with Guthki to look at what recipes he sells.
Tawarbes is in the Woodworker's Guild-hall in Esteldín. Viola Brockhouse has directed you to speak with Tawarbes to look at what recipes she sells.
